name: VK Teams Node Verification Matrix
description: Draft workflow for real VK Teams custom-node verification: action matrix via form plus long-poll trigger branch. Assign a VK Teams API credential after import.

parameters.content:
## VK Teams verification matrix

Form branch runs real custom-node actions with assigned `VK Teams API` credential. Use a dedicated test chatId because it sends text, file, and voice messages, then tries best-effort cleanup.

Covered actions: bot.getSelf, chat.getInfo, message.sendText/editText/deleteMessages, message.sendFile/sendVoice, file.getInfo/download, callback.answerCallbackQuery when callbackQueryId is provided.

Trigger branch covers long polling for message, editedMessage, deletedMessage, callbackQuery with Download Files enabled. Keep workflow draft unless you intentionally want another active long-poll consumer for this bot.

parameters.formDescription: Runs real VK Teams Bot API checks through the custom VK Teams node. Provide a dedicated test chatId; message/file/voice operations send real messages and cleanup best-effort.

values.placeholder: chatId for a bot-accessible test chat
Optional; used if sendFile does not return fileId
Optional; only needed to verify callback.answerCallbackQuery

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map((item) => ({ json: { verificationArea: 'trigger.longPoll', eventType: item.json.type, eventId: item.json.eventId, chatId: item.json.payload?.chat?.chatId, userId: item.json.payload?.from?.userId, hasBinary: Boolean(item.binary && Object.keys(item.binary).length > 0), binaryFields: item.binary ? Object.keys(item.binary) : [], payloadKeys: Object.keys(item.json.payload || {}).sort() } }));
